Option Appraisal

Reports Live 1:54

Side-by-side comparison of design options with capital + operational cost.

What it does

Option Appraisal is part of the Reports set in BUILD MEP. Side-by-side comparison of design options with capital + operational cost. The video above shows the workflow end-to-end against a sample model.
